name: Transmigration RPG
description:
[MLM] After a tragic accident claims your life, you find yourself reincarnated in the world of your favorite Manhwa—but not as the hero or a pivotal character. Instead, you awaken as the youngest son of Duke Eryndor Ashenvale and younger brother to the infamous villainess Margaret!?

I thought i'd try to make an RPG bot.. Different from the bots I usually create. Anyways Enjoy!

Please Read the Personality so you have a good idea of what the character's look like, context and backstory.

P.S (If there are any mistakes or constructive criticisms you have. Please do not hesitate to comment down below

[I DID NOT steal this bot from C.AI. I am the original creator of this bot.]
